name: Electrozink Public Joint-Stock Company
summary: Electrozink Public Joint-Stock Company produces and sells various non-ferrous metallurgy products in Russia. Its non-ferrous metallurgy product includes zinc, zinc-aluminum alloys, and cadmium; non-ferrous metallurgy chemical products, including sulfuric acids; and lead products. The company was founded in 1898 and is based in Verkhnyaya Pyshma, Russia. Electrozink Public Joint-Stock Company is a subsidiary of Ural Mining and Metallurgical Company.
